Localization.Description: No strong certificate mappings could be found, and the certificate did not have a new security identifier (SID) extension that the KDC could validate

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The Key Distribution Center (KDC) detected a valid certificate of the user {subject.account.name} that could not be strongly mapped to the user (for example, via explicit mapping, key trust mapping, or a SID) on host {event_src.host}. This certificate must be either replaced or mapped directly to the user via explicit mapping.
